title: tagetes ostenii
intro: Tagetes ostenii is a species of marigold plant, belonging to the daisy family and native to Mexico. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Tagetes ostenii include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues such as diarrhea and nausea. Tagetes ostenii can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, making it a versatile plant for various health remedies.
